description_long: This lounge features a robust, rectangular wooden frame with a dark gray, woodgrain finish, giving it a modern and urban aesthetic. The backrest is tall and flat, with a subtle grid pattern that adds visual interest, while the side panels are gently curved for comfort and style. The seat area is wide and flat, suitable for reclining or seating multiple people, and the base includes two large, integrated drawers for storage, each with a matching grid pattern on the front. The legs are minimal and barely visible, providing a low-profile stance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with all surfaces finished in the same dark wood texture, and the design is both functional and visually cohesive. This piece would fit well in parks, urban plazas, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, dark gray wooden lounge with a tall grid-patterned backrest, curved side panels, and integrated storage drawers. The design is sturdy, functional, and visually cohesive with a woodgrain finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall backrest with grid pattern, curved side panels, and two large storage drawers at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the gentle curve of the side panel and the flat, expansive seat area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and width of the back panel, with the woodgrain texture uninterrupted and no visible drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the curved side panel and the flat seat surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No visible cushions; the seat and backrest are solid wood surfaces.
attribute_backrest_design: Tall, flat backrest with a subtle grid pattern and straight edges, providing full back support.
attribute_armrest_presence: Curved, solid wood side panels act as low-profile armrests.
attribute_leg_style: Short, minimal legs mostly hidden from view, likely straight and made of wood or metal for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: No upholstery; surfaces feature a consistent dark woodgrain texture with grid detailing on the backrest and drawers.
